testcase.name: test_fix4_email_failure_recorded

failure.message: AssertionError: no FAILED email_logs row: sample=[{'id': '6618bb3d-1f01-4abe-8f2e-794fbaf966a7', 'userId': None, 'to': 'resendtest_cebbbf@seojalwa.com', 'subject': 'Reset your password', 'templateKey': 'password-reset', 'status': 'SKIPPED', 'provider': None, 'statusCode': None, 'errorMessage': 'no_email_provider_configured', 'sentAt': '2026-05-22T08:59:33.614532+00:00'}, {'id': 'aaca4fb0-1b63-4f41-b481-976c99c8d381', 'userId': None, 'to': 'resendtest_cebbbf@seojalwa.com', 'subject': 'Welcome to SEO Jalwa #x1F680', 'templateKey': 'welcome', 'status': 'SKIPPED', 'provider': None, 'statusCode': None, 'errorMessage': 'no_email_provider_configured', 'sentAt': '2026-05-22T08:59:33.488745+00:00'}] assert []

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration5_fixes.py:593: in test_fix4_email_failure_recorded assert failed, f"no FAILED email_logs row: sample={rows[:2]}" E AssertionError: no FAILED email_logs row: sample=[{'id': '6618bb3d-1f01-4abe-8f2e-794fbaf966a7', 'userId': None, 'to': 'resendtest_cebbbf@seojalwa.com', 'subject': 'Reset your password', 'templateKey': 'password-reset', 'status': 'SKIPPED', 'provider': None, 'statusCode': None, 'errorMessage': 'no_email_provider_configured', 'sentAt': '2026-05-22T08:59:33.614532+00:00'}, {'id': 'aaca4fb0-1b63-4f41-b481-976c99c8d381', 'userId': None, 'to': 'resendtest_cebbbf@seojalwa.com', 'subject': 'Welcome to SEO Jalwa #x1F680', 'templateKey': 'welcome', 'status': 'SKIPPED', 'provider': None, 'statusCode': None, 'errorMessage': 'no_email_provider_configured', 'sentAt': '2026-05-22T08:59:33.488745+00:00'}] E assert []
